---
title: "synapse_auth.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\synapse\synapse_auth.py"
loc: 41
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.40
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 4.69
---

## Intent
The `synapse_auth.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on PersonaVerifier, __init__, _load_secret, generate_challenge, solve_challenge, verify_response, SynapseAuthenticator, authenticate_sync. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via PersonaVerifier, __init__, _load_secret, generate_challenge, solve_challenge, verify_response, SynapseAuthenticator, authenticate_sync. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [hashlib](file://hashlib)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [random](file://random)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `PersonaVerifier`
- `__init__`
- `_load_secret`
- `generate_challenge`
- `solve_challenge`
- `verify_response`
- `SynapseAuthenticator`
- `authenticate_sync`
